name: PK Contracting
message: PK Contracting is a leader in pavement marking services, offering a range of solutions including permanent and temporary markings, pavement marking removal, and polymerized cement surfacing. With over 40 years of experience, they utilize advanced technology and equipment to ensure safety and reliability for their clients. Their primary clients include road builders, government agencies, and motorists seeking high-quality pavement marking. PK Contracting is committed to craftsmanship and is recognized for their safety standards and skilled personnel.
